title: What Should The Employee Do Differently Cyber Awareness
source_filename: What Should The Employee Do Differently Cyber Awareness.docx

qas.q: Did you earn a Cyber Security Awareness Challenge 2018 Certificate of Completion?
Which of the following does NOT constitute spillage?
qas.a: Classified information that should be unclassified and is downgraded

qas.q: Which of the following is NOT an appropriate way to protect against inadvertent spillage?
qas.a: Use the classified network for all work, including unclassified work

qas.q: Which of the following should you NOT do if you find classified information on the internet?
What level of damage to national security can you reasonably expect Top Secret information to cause if disclosed?
Which of the following is true about telework?
qas.a: You must have your organization's permission to telework.

qas.q: Which of the following is true of protecting classified data?
qas.a: Classified material must be appropriately marked.

qas.q: In addition to avoiding the temptation of greed to betray his country, what should Alex do differently?
qas.a: Avoid talking about work outside of the workplace or with people without a need-to-know

qas.q:
Ellen's Statement

How many insider threat indicators does Alex demonstrate?

Mark's Statement

What should Alex's colleagues do?
qas.a: Report the suspicious behavior in accordance with their organization's insider threat policy

qas.q: Select all sections of the profile that contain an issue. Then select Submit.
Select the appropriate setting for each item. Then select Save.
qas.a:
Name and profile picture - Any

Status, photos, and posts - Friends Only

Family and relationships - Friends Only

Birthday - Friends Only

Photos and videos you are in - Friends Only

Check in location via GPS: Off

qas.q: Which of the following is NOT an example of sensitive information?
Which of the following is NOT a correct way to protect sensitive information?
qas.a: Sensitive information may be stored on any password-protected system.

qas.q:
Victim

Select the information on the data sheet that is personally identifiable information (PII) but not protected health information (PHI).
Select the information on the data sheet that is protected health information (PHI).

Incident #1

What should the employee do differently?
qas.a: Remove his CAC and lock his workstation.

qas.q:
Incident #2

What should the employee do differently?
qas.a: Decline to let the person in and redirect her to security.

qas.q:
Incident

Select all violations at this unattended workstation. Then select Submit.
qas.a:
Laptop with CAC left inserted

Sticky note with Pin number

qas.q:
Prevalence

Which of the following is an example of malicious code?
qas.a: Software that installs itself without the user's knowledge

qas.q:
Damage
How can malicious code cause damage?

Spread

How can you avoid downloading malicious code?
qas.a: Do not access website links in e-mail messages

Incident

Select Yes or No for each item. Then select Submit. (Permitted Uses of Government-Furnished Equipment GFE))
qas.a:
Viewing or downloading pornography - No

Gambling online - No

Conducting a private money-making venture - No

Using unauthorized software - No

Illegally downloading copyrighted material - No

Making unauthorized configuration changes - No

qas.q:
Incident

When is it okay to charge a personal mobile device using government-furnished equipment (GFE)?
Which of the following demonstrates proper protection of mobile devices?
qas.a: Linda encrypts all of the sensitive data on her government-issued mobile devices.
